snippet.title: Fred again.. & Thomas Bangalter (USB002, Alexandra Palace, London 27 February 2026)
snippet.description:
so I had a dream last week,

and basically all it was, is I was 80, sat in a like a care home, and I kept saying to the nurses “jus play it again pls”

and I was just sat there watching the usb show with Thomas over and over again 😂😂😂😂 
and then I sat there being like ‘look that’s me! I’m there!’

I usually have a rule that I don’t watch anything back, I just do the thing, and then try to stay present and just sorta keep working on writing music, like I’ve still never watched our Glastonbury set. Or most things tbh, but yeah with this, I justtttt. Can’t. Stop.

probably because a lot of it isn’t my music, so it’s not subject to my usual very critical inner voice about stuff. instead I’m just a fan more proud of a sort of human moment than anything else. 

now I know in a way it sounds kinda morbid in some ways
buttt lemme tell you, one thing was very clear when I woke up. 
it was not a nightmare, it was definitely a dream.

Eternally grateful ❤️

shot by charlie, liam, cayden, caitlin, ieuan, euan, ben, patrick & mike

edited & graded by charlie hutchins

snippet.title: Calling All Villains - Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember... 

STAY TUNED...

snippet.title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game - Official Release Date Pre-Order Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the Pre-Order Trailer for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, an upcoming 2D anime action fighting game based on the hit Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra series, developed by Gameplay Group International in collaboration with Paramount. Players will face off against their favorite characters from the Avatar universe, from Aang, Korra, and more. Fight across a suite of different modes from Story Mode, Arcade Mode, Ranked, and more with rollback netcode and crossplay across platforms. Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game is launching on July 2 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with an eventual release on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2.
